Localization.Description: Attempt to change files in upload/download directory of the Electronic Budget on the File Share

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User "{subject.account.name}" changed file "{object.fullpath}" in upload/download directory of the Electronic Budget on the File Share from IP address {src.ip}
User "{subject.account.name}" created or recreated file "{object.fullpath}" in upload/download directory of the Electronic Budget on the File Share from IP address {src.ip}
